review_notes: CSS change is minimal and correct: overflow-hidden replaced with overflow-y-auto for mobile scroll fix
Removed pb-32 is not a regression since paddingBottom is set via inline style with safe-area-inset-bottom
Test file uses source-code parsing approach which is pragmatic for CSS-only verification
Test covers 4 assertions: overflow-y-auto present, overflow-hidden absent, pb-32 absent, flex-1 present
No code smells, no refactoring needed
message: No refactoring needed. The change is a single CSS class modification (overflow-hidden to overflow-y-auto) with appropriate test coverage. All 5380 tests pass, 0 lint errors, 0 type errors.
